name: query_causal_evidence
description: Query causal evidence about interdisciplinary research effects. Based on causal analysis of 2.9 million arXiv papers using TARNet and DML. Returns ATE/CATE estimates by domain, team size, and time period. Supports both English and Chinese queries.

query.description: Natural language question, e.g. 'Does interdisciplinary research help in CS?' or 'Is it worth doing cross-domain work in a small team?'

k.description: Number of evidence documents to retrieve (default 3, range 1-10)
